steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Quantum Threat Inventory · Theory Crypto Go Quantum Threat In…
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 2750 during a post-quantum compatibility canary. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate hybrid ML-KEM and ML-DSA migration on inventory, specified combiner, transcript binding, downgrade defense, and rollback; cap bytes, work, memory, time, attempts, concurrency, and retained secret material before use; then remove one transfer gate and state exactly which production claim is no longer supported. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
